faqs.question: How do I know if I have drain flies in my Richmond Hill property?
faqs.answer: Drain flies are small, fuzzy-looking flies typically found near sinks, drains, showers, and bathrooms. They appear moth-like in flight and often rest on walls near plumbing fixtures. If you notice small flies congregating around drains or damp areas in your Richmond Hill home or business, you likely have a drain fly infestation.

faqs.question: What does drain fly treatment cost in Richmond Hill?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Richmond Hill range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of affected drains, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in drain fly activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks as the treatment addresses both adult flies and larvae breeding in drain biofilm. Our technicians will schedule follow-up visits if needed to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes! After treatment, we provide Richmond Hill customers with prevention tips including regular drain cleaning, using enzyme-based drain cleaners monthly, fixing leaky pipes promptly, and ensuring proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchens. Our team can also set up ongoing maintenance plans to keep your drains fly-free year-round.
